routes.title: Accordion
routes.description: A collapsable component lets users show and hide sections of related content on a page.

routes.title: Alert
routes.description: For urgent, high-impact messages, such as system alerts, alert banners are used to ensure visibility and encourage immediate user response.

routes.title: Avatar
routes.description: A small image or icon that identifies and personalizes the user within the interface.

routes.title: Badge
routes.description: Briefly highlights or categorizes associated UI elements with concise visual cues for status or metadata.

routes.title: Box
routes.description: Box is a basic layout component that serves as a wrapper or container. It's based on the Chakra UI Box component and supports all style props for rapid UI development.

routes.title: Button
routes.description: A button serves as a standardized, reusable component for triggering actions and navigating.

routes.title: Calendar
routes.description: Calendars display a grid of days in one or more months and allow users to select a single date.

routes.title: Card
routes.description: A versatile container component presents self-contained information, often combining text, images, and actions, making it ideal for displaying summaries or content previews.

routes.title: Checkbox
routes.description: Checkbox allows for toggling of features, allowing users to select more than one option where needed. Checkboxes support selected, unselected, indeterminate, and disabled states.

routes.title: Code
routes.description: renders code blocks

routes.title: Collapsible motion
routes.description: A modern, accessible implementation of collapsible content with smooth height animations. Built with React Aria for accessibility and Chakra UI for consistent theming.

routes.title: Combo box
routes.description: A combobox is an input that combines a text field with a pop-up list of options. It allows users to select a value from a predefined list or enter their own custom value.

routes.title: Data table
routes.description: Data tables display sets of data across rows and columns. Use them to organize information, enable comparisons, and allow users to inspect and interact with large datasets.

routes.title: Date input
routes.description: A date input component allows users to enter a specific date.

routes.title: Date picker
routes.description: A date picker is a UI component for users to input or select a specific calendar date.

routes.title: Date range picker
routes.description: Allows users to select a start and end date from a calendar interface.

routes.title: Dialog
routes.description: A foundational dialog component for overlays that require user attention and interaction. Built with React Aria Components for accessibility and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

routes.title: Draggable list
routes.description: The draggable list allows users to easily reorder or manage a sequence of items via a direct drag-and-drop interaction.

routes.title: Drawer
routes.description: A foundational drawer component for overlays that require user attention and interaction. Built with React Aria Components for accessibility and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.

routes.title: Field errors
routes.description: Context specific, localized error messages for individual form fields.

routes.title: Flex
routes.description: Flex is a layout component that provides a convenient way to create flexible layouts based on CSS Flexbox. It's based on the Chakra UI Flex component and supports all style props for rapid UI development.

routes.title: Form field
routes.description: Form fields are the building blocks of user interaction, collecting essential data, facilitating actions, and enabling customization within digital interfaces.

routes.title: Grid
routes.description: The Grid Layout Component provides a flexible and responsive way to structure content using a two-dimensional grid system. It allows elements to be arranged in rows and columns, enabling dynamic and efficient layouts for different screen sizes. The component accepts all the chakra supported properties and Grid.Item as children elements.

routes.title: Group
routes.description: Groups related elements together for better organization and layout.

routes.title: Heading
routes.description: The heading component establishes typographic hierarchy throughout the product experience. It is crucial for organizing content, defining page structure, and improving content scan ability.

routes.title: Icon
routes.description: An icon is a small graphical symbol used to represent an object, action, or idea within a user interface.

routes.title: Icon button
routes.description: Provides a compact and visually efficient way to represent actions, especially when space is limited or the action is universally understood.

routes.title: Icon toggle button
routes.description: An interactive icon button that toggles between two binary states such as active and inactive.

routes.title: Image
routes.description: An image component is used to display visual content like photographs, illustrations, or graphics within the UI to support, illustrate, or enhance textual information.

routes.title: Inline svg
routes.description: The InlineSvg component allows you to render arbitrary SVG markup as an icon with built-in XSS protection. It sanitizes the provided SVG string to remove potentially dangerous elements and attributes before rendering.

routes.title: Kbd
routes.description: The KBD component visually renders a keystroke or key combination to highlight it within textual instructions.

routes.title: Link
routes.description: A link is a clickable element that navigates users to another page, section of the page, or resource, and is visually distinguished by styling.

routes.title: List
routes.description: The list component organizes related items or data into a vertical, scannable format.

routes.title: Loading spinner
routes.description: A circular visual indicator that displays the loading status of an ongoing process. It can represent either determinate or indeterminate progress.

routes.title: Localized field
routes.description: A localized field is a single component that enables users to input and manage content for multiple language versions of a piece of data within one unified form area.

routes.title: Menu
routes.description: A temporary surface that displays a list of choices or actions. It typically appears when a user interacts with an element like a button or icon, or performs a specific action.

routes.title: Money input
routes.description: A controlled input for money values that combines currency selection with amount input, supporting both standard and high-precision monetary values.

routes.title: Multiline text input
routes.description: A multi-line text input allows users to enter longer blocks of text across multiple lines. It is suitable for paragraphs, descriptions, or any input requiring more than a single line.

routes.title: Nimbus i18n provider
routes.description: The NimbusI18nProvider component provides internationalization (i18n) context for React Aria components in your Nimbus application. It controls how dates, numbers, and other locale-specific content is formatted across all React Aria-based components.

routes.title: Nimbus provider
routes.description: The NimbusProvider component is a required wrapper that provides theming, internationalization, and routing context for all Nimbus components. It must be placed at the root of your application.

routes.title: Number input
routes.description: A number input allows users to enter numerical values and adjust them incrementally.

routes.title: PageContent
routes.description: A layout component that constrains page content width and arranges content in single or multi-column layouts. It consolidates multiple width-based containers into a single compound component with explicit column control.

routes.title: Pagination
routes.description: Pagination is a component that divides a large set of content or data into sequential pages, providing navigation controls to move between them.

routes.title: Password input
routes.description: A password input is a text field that hides entered characters for secure password entry.

routes.title: Progress bar
routes.description: A linear visual indicator that displays the loading or completion state of an ongoing process. It can represent either determinate or indeterminate progress.

routes.title: Radio input
routes.description: A set of closely related, mutually exclusive or complementary actions that are important enough to be displayed directly in the interface for quick access.

routes.title: Range calendar
routes.description: Range calendar displays a grid of days in one or more months and allow users to select a range of dates.

routes.title: Rich text input
routes.description: The rich text input component allows users to input and format text using a user friendly interface. Changing standard text inputs into fully featured edits, supporting formatting, linking, and embedding.

routes.title: Scoped search input
routes.description: Enables users to define where their search query is applied using a closely paired scope selector.

routes.title: Search input
routes.description: Allows users to discover and filter content by entering text to help users find relevant information efficiently.

routes.title: Select
routes.description: A select input is a form field that presents users with a dropdown menu of options to choose from.

routes.title: Separator
routes.description: A separator is a visual or semantic line that groups and divides content, establishing rhythm and hierarchy within a layout.

routes.title: Simple grid
routes.description: SimpleGrid offers an intuitive way to easily create responsive grid layouts.

routes.title: Spacer
routes.description: A simple layout component that automatically fills available space in flex layouts using flexGrow 1.

routes.title: Split button
routes.description: A split button merges a main action with a dropdown for related, less common actions.

routes.title: Stack
routes.description: An easily customizable Stack component, re-exported from Chakra UI stack component, that provides a consistent and responsive layout structure across different products. Stacks allow you to effortlessly build flexible layouts with automatic distribution. You can arrange elements horizontally or vertically, adding spacing and/or separators between each item.

routes.title: Steps
routes.description: A progress indicator with built-in navigation that visually communicates the user's position within a multi-step process such as forms, wizards, and onboarding flows.

routes.title: Switch
routes.description: A clear, visual toggle, allowing users to activate or deactivate a setting quickly.

routes.title: Table
routes.description: The Table component provides a straightforward way to display static, read-only data in a tabular format. It uses semantic HTML table elements and is designed for simple data presentation without interactive features like sorting, filtering, or selection.

routes.title: Tabs
routes.description: Organizes content into distinct sections, enabling users to switch views within a single container.

routes.title: Tag group
routes.description: A tag group is a compact, interactive element. It categorizes, labels, or adds attributes to objects for quick recognition and filtering.

routes.title: Text
routes.description: Text styles are predefined collections of typography rules (including font-size, font-weight, line-height, and letter-spacing) that create reusable, consistent styles.

routes.title: Text input
routes.description: Allows users to enter information like names, addresses, emails, passwords, search queries, or any other text-based data.

routes.title: Time input
routes.description: A time input allows users to enter and select a specific time. It supports flexible input methods while ensuring accuracy and ease of use.

routes.title: Toast
routes.description: Displays brief, temporary notifications that confirm actions or provide status updates without interrupting the user's workflow.

routes.title: Toggle button
routes.description: An interactive button that toggles between two binary states such as active and inactive.

routes.title: Toggle button group
routes.description: A set of closely related, mutually exclusive or complementary actions that are important enough to be displayed directly in the interface for quick access.

routes.title: Toolbar
routes.description: Toolbars organize related actions and controls in a compact bar for easy access. They provide consistent placement for common or contextual tasks within an application.

routes.title: Tooltip
routes.description: A contextual popup that displays a description for an element.

routes.title: Visually hidden
routes.description: Makes content accessible to screen readers but hides it visually.

routes.title: Accessibility
routes.description: Components designed to enhance accessibility and ARIA compliance.

routes.title: ADR: Using Architecture Decision Records
routes.description: An explanation of what Architecture Decision Records are and how we use them

routes.title: ADR: On Consumer Component API's
routes.description: Architecture decision record on how to structure component APIs for flexibility and maintainability

routes.title: ADR: Standardizing Compound Component Extraction to a `components` Directory
routes.description: Architecture decision record on organizing compound component implementations

routes.title: ADR: Nimbus Software Lifecycle States
routes.description: Architecture decision record defining the lifecycle states for Nimbus components, hooks, utilities, classes, etc.

routes.title: Background
routes.description: JSX style props for styling background colors, gradients, and images.

routes.title: Border
routes.description: JSX style props for styling border and border radius.

routes.title: Buttons
routes.description: Components for triggering actions, submitting forms, and navigation.

routes.title: Layout
routes.description: Components that structure the content on the page.

routes.title: Components
routes.description: React components for building robust and visually appealing applications.

routes.title: Local Development Setup
routes.description: Set up nimbus for local development

routes.title: Data Display
routes.description: Components for presenting data or visual content.

routes.title: Display
routes.description: Style props for styling display of an element.

routes.title: Effects
routes.description: JSX style props for styling box shadows, opacity, and more

routes.title: Feedback
routes.description: Components for providing user feedback.

routes.title: Fields
routes.description: Field pattern components that integrate inputs within FormField for consistent form layouts

routes.title: Filters
routes.description: JSX style props for applying various filters to elements.

routes.title: Flex and Grid
routes.description: JSX style props to control flex and grid layouts

routes.title: Forms
routes.description: Components for form validation, localization, and error handling.

routes.title: Contributing
routes.description: Contribute to the nimbus development

routes.description: Quick start guide to set up and use the package.

routes.description: How to add Nimbus to your react frontend

routes.title: Testing Setup
routes.description: Configure Jest or Vitest to test Nimbus components

routes.description: Start here if you're new.

routes.title: Hooke
routes.description: react hooks

routes.title: Inputs
routes.description: Form controls for data entry and selection

routes.title: Interactivity
routes.description: JSX style props to enhance interactivity on an element

routes.title: Layout
routes.description: JSX style props to control the width, height, and spacing of elements

routes.title: List
routes.description: JSX style props for customizing list styles.

routes.title: Markdown
routes.description: a page with many mdx & markdown features

routes.title: Media
routes.description: Components for displaying media content.

routes.title: Navigation
routes.description: Components for moving through an application.

routes.title: Nimbus Export Stats
routes.description: List of exports from the @commercetools/nimbus package

routes.title: Patterns
routes.description: Reusable component patterns and compositions for common use cases

routes.title: Playground
routes.description: collection of pages with an explorative character

routes.title: Release Process
routes.description: How Nimbus releases work and how to stay informed

routes.title: Sizing
routes.description: JSX style props for sizing an element

routes.title: Spacing
routes.description: JSX style props for controlling the padding and margin of an element.

routes.title: Typography
routes.description: JSX style props for styling text

routes.title: Style Props
routes.description: JSX style props for applying CSS rules

routes.title: SVG
routes.description: JSX style props for SVG elements.

routes.title: Tables
routes.description: JSX style props for styling table elements.

routes.title: Toc
routes.description: Let's get the table of contents automatically generated

routes.title: Animations
routes.description: The list of available animation tokens

routes.title: Aspect Ratios
routes.description: The list of available aspect ratio tokens

routes.title: Blurs
routes.description: The list of available blur tokens

routes.title: Borders
routes.description: The list of available border tokens

routes.title: Breakpoints
routes.description: The list of available breakpoints

routes.title: Colors
routes.description: available colors

routes.title: Cursors
routes.description: The list of available cursor tokens

routes.title: Radii
routes.description: The list of available radius tokens

routes.title: Shadows
routes.description: The list of available shadow tokens

routes.title: Sizes
routes.description: The list of available size tokens

routes.title: Spacing
routes.description: Spacing tokens are used to define the space between elements.

routes.title: Typography
routes.description: everything typography related

routes.title: Z-Indices
routes.description: The list of available z-index tokens

routes.title: Other
routes.description: Less frequently used design-tokens

routes.title: Design Tokens
routes.description: Style definitions (colors, fonts, spacing, etc.) for consistent UI components.

routes.title: Transforms
routes.description: JSX style props for transforming elements.

routes.title: Transitions
routes.description: JSX style props for controlling an element's transition and animation.

routes.title: Typography
routes.description: Components for text styling and formatting.

routes.title: Utilities
routes.description: Low-level or functional components for utility purposes.

routes.title: useCopyToClipboard
routes.description: copy text to the clipboard

routes.title: useHotkeys
routes.description: use keyboard shortcuts to do stuff

routes.description: This pattern component integrates the DateRangePicker within a FormField using a simple, consistent, and opinionated API.

routes.title: Multiline text input field
routes.description: This pattern component integrates the MultilineTextInput within a FormField using a simple, consistent, and opinionated API.

routes.description: This pattern component integrates the NumberInput within a FormField using a simple, consistent, and opinionated API.
